commit_message:
Fix support disable task by name (#6853) Fix support disable task by name (#6853) Adds support for disable <task_name> (including dotted task scope resolution cases already covered by regressions, fixes #6853) and fixes a related runtime issue where killing a forked task process could leave fork..join blocked due to miscounting completed tasks. Adds in a number of regression test cases to exercise the change.

As a note I did tackle this with genai (which seems to be allowed).

Adds in a number of regression test cases to exercise the change.

examples.patch:
@@ -811,6 +811,7 @@ class VCMethod final {
         FORK_DONE,
         FORK_INIT,
         FORK_JOIN,
+        FORK_ON_KILL,
         RANDOMIZER_BASIC_STD_RANDOMIZATION,
         RANDOMIZER_CLEARCONSTRAINTS,
         RANDOMIZER_CLEARALL,
@@ -947,6 +948,7 @@ inline std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& os, const VCMethod& rhs) {
            {FORK_DONE, "done", false}, \
            {FORK_INIT, "init", false}, \
            {FORK_JOIN, "join", false}, \
+           {FORK_ON_KILL, "onKill", false}, \
            {RANDOMIZER_BASIC_STD_RANDOMIZATION, "basicStdRandomization", false}, \
            {RANDOMIZER_CLEARCONSTRAINTS, "clearConstraints", false}, \
            {RANDOMIZER_CLEARALL, "clearAll", false}, \

examples.before_code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Verilog Test driver/expect definition
#
# This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it
# under the terms of either the GNU Lesser General Public License Version 3
# or the Perl Artistic License Version 2.0.
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2024 Wilson Snyder
# SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-only OR Artistic-2.0

import vltest_bootstrap

test.scenarios('linter')

test.lint(fails=True, expect_filename=test.golden_filename)

test.passes()
examples.after_code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# DESCRIPTION: Verilator: Verilog Test driver/expect definition
#
# This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it
# under the terms of either the GNU Lesser General Public License Version 3
# or the Perl Artistic License Version 2.0.
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2024 Wilson Snyder
# SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-only OR Artistic-2.0

import vltest_bootstrap

test.scenarios('simulator')

test.compile(timing_loop=True, verilator_flags2=["--timing"])

test.execute()

test.passes()
